---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for the Creative Commons Norway website
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve, or the motivation behind the request.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or implementation ideas.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references related to the request.
